lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: Hello, [brother/sister/friend], you fit in much better now that you're correctly attired. Before you stuck out like a sore thumb! Keep your eyes peeled though; I've heard there are thieves amongst us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are all you people doing here?

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: Many of us disagree with the king about what freedoms the local monster population should have. We're taking a stand and mobilising our forces against the monstrous hordes.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: I'm totally in awe of Johanhus, he really knows what's what. I know he keeps going on about monsters and it's clear there are too many of them, so hey, I agree with whatever Johanhus says.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: We're against the monsters..like Johanhus says...we don't like them...you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you and what do you do here?

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: I'm a strong believer in the non-monsters policy...we should really get rid of them...and if that means I have to live in a cave like a monster, so be it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think you're going to achieve?

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: We want a world without monsters, to live in safety and without fear of being attacked by these ferocious beasts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But there aren't that many ferocious beasts in the towns and cities.

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: That's not enough, we want to get rid of them totally, we want to enjoy the surrounding lands and not worry about our children playing in caves and so on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did all you people come from?

lines.speaker: H.A.M. Guard
lines.text: Most of us came from small towns that had been attacked by monsters. We all got fed up with it and so decided to join this movement. We're hoping to return to the towns and cities when we've cleaned up the areas
